en.name: Wordle
en.desc: The viral word puzzle sensation! You have 6 attempts to guess a hidden 5-letter word. Color-coded feedback helps you narrow down the answer. Daily puzzles await!
en.howToPlay: Type a 5-letter word and press Enter. Green letters are correct in the right spot. Yellow letters are in the word but wrong position. Gray letters are not in the word.
tips: Start with words containing common letters (R, S, T, L, N)
Use different letters each guess initially

zh.name: 猜词
zh.desc: 风靡全球的猜词游戏！6次机会猜测隐藏的5字母单词。颜色提示帮助您缩小答案范围。每日谜题等你挑战！
zh.howToPlay: 输入一个5字母单词并按回车。绿色字母表示位置正确。黄色字母表示在单词中但位置错误。灰色字母表示不在单词中。
tips: 从包含常用字母的单词开始（R, S, T, L, N）
最初的猜测尽量使用不同的字母
黄色字母帮助缩小位置范围
